name: Bee
description: Honeybees working a cream-gold afternoon — banded bodies at every heading, wings blurred mid-beat, re-routed each redraw.

code.style: --waggle: @rand(360deg); --rule: ( /* body and wing share one emitted heading; the stripes are a static two-band gradient hidden beneath the transform */ --bh2: @r(360deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 28%; top: 38%; width: 44%; height: 24%; border-radius: 99px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--color1) 0% 34%, var(--color2) 34% 56%, var(--color1) 56% 78%, var(--color2) 78% 100%); transform: rotate(@var(--bh2)); transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 40%; top: 22%; width: 20%; height: 18%; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color3); opacity: 0.75; transform: rotate(@var(--bh2)); transform-origin: 50% 156%; transition: ease 600ms; } } @random(0.12) { :before { background: var(--color2); transform: rotate(var(--waggle)) scale(0.6); } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
